reason: Content is a study guide/exam preparation material (FLS Modules Latest Update 2025-2026 with 360 Questions) presented as text pages and promotional overlays. No actual laparoscopic surgical skill performance is visible. No laparoscopic instruments, trainer box, or procedural execution present.
frame_content_summary: Frames 1-5 show multiple choice examination questions and answers related to laparoscopic surgery knowledge topics (contraindications, complications, techniques). Frames 6-17 show identical or similar exam content pages. No procedural video of any FLS task (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture) is present.
